key.name: active-provider
key.description: The provider identifier selected for new conversations.

key.name: active-model
key.description: The model identifier selected for new conversations.

key.name: enabled-providers
key.description: Provider identifiers available in chat provider pickers.

key.name: provider-default-models
key.description: JSON object mapping provider identifiers to their default model identifiers.

key.name: provider-discovered-models
key.description: JSON object mapping provider identifiers to discovered model metadata.

key.name: send-with-enter
key.description: Whether pressing Enter in the composer sends the message.

key.name: response-timeout-seconds
key.description: How many seconds to wait before cancelling a provider request.

key.name: provider-fallback-enabled
key.description: Whether failed provider requests should retry with another enabled provider.

key.name: high-contrast-enabled
key.description: Whether Cusco should increase interface contrast.

key.name: reduced-motion-enabled
key.description: Whether Cusco should avoid nonessential motion.

key.name: custom-openai-compatible-base-url
key.description: Base URL for the user-defined OpenAI-compatible provider.

key.name: custom-openai-compatible-models
key.description: Model identifiers for the user-defined OpenAI-compatible provider.
